finland.title: Finland
finland.subtitle: Land of Auroras, Lakes, and Forests
finland.intro: Our home market. From Lapland's wilderness to the Lakeland forests, with hotel bookings, custom activities, and deep local experiences.
finland.hotelsDesc: From Lapland glass igloos to Helsinki design hotels, all price tiers covered. Long-term local partnerships secure scarce peak-season inventory at preferred rates.

hotelsItems.name: Kakslauttanen Arctic Resort
hotelsItems.desc: Watch the auroras from your bed in glass-domed igloos — among the world's top aurora hotels

hotelsItems.name: Arctic SnowHotel
hotelsItems.desc: Rebuilt every winter, with ice sauna and aurora ice suites

hotelsItems.name: Hotel St. George
hotelsItems.desc: New Nordic design, art collection, Michelin dining

hotelsItems.name: Punkaharju Hotel
hotelsItems.desc: Century-old lakeside lodge, sauna, canoe, forest

hotelsItems.name: Levi Hotel Spa
hotelsItems.desc: Slope-side ski resort with spa and family facilities

finland.activitiesDesc: Aurora viewing, ski instruction, sailing, photography sessions — every season delivers.

experiences.title: Aurora Hunting
experiences.desc: Rovaniemi/Inari professional aurora tours with real-time forecasting

experiences.title: Ski Instruction
experiences.desc: Levi/Ylläs resort ski instructors, beginner to advanced 1:1

experiences.title: Archipelago Sailing
experiences.desc: Turku archipelago/Helsinki summer sailing with skipper

experiences.title: Lakeland Retreats
experiences.desc: Cabin getaways with sauna, canoeing, foraging

experiences.title: Snowmobiling
experiences.desc: Lapland wilderness snowmobile tours with instruction and gear

norway.subtitle: Fjords and the Aurora Coast
norway.intro: From Tromsø to Lofoten, Geirangerfjord to the Atlantic Road — Norway's most breathtaking northern landscapes.

routesItems.name: Lofoten Islands
routesItems.desc: Red fishing villages, snow peaks meeting the sea

routesItems.name: Tromsø
routesItems.desc: Gateway to the Arctic, husky sledding & auroras

routesItems.desc: City of Roses, Hundred Hills viewpoint

routesItems.name: Longyearbyen

activitiesItems.name: King Crab Safari
activitiesItems.desc: Northern Norway king crab fishing with on-site tasting

iceland.title: Iceland
iceland.subtitle: Land of Fire and Ice
iceland.intro: Waterfalls, glaciers, geysers, black-sand beaches — every inch of Iceland is a geological marvel.

routesItems.name: Golden Circle
routesItems.desc: Þingvellir National Park + Geysir + Gullfoss waterfall

routesItems.name: Snæfellsnes Peninsula

denmark.title: Denmark
denmark.subtitle: Hidden Islands of the North Atlantic
denmark.intro: Beyond Copenhagen, Denmark's most rewarding destinations are its remote territories — Greenland and the Faroe Islands.

routesItems.name: Greenland
routesItems.desc: Ilulissat icefjord, Nuuk Arctic culture, midnight sun

routesItems.name: Faroe Islands
routesItems.desc: Cliffs, waterfalls, grass-roof villages, North Atlantic isolation

routesItems.name: Copenhagen
routesItems.desc: Fairytale city, birthplace of Nordic design and New Nordic cuisine

china.title: China
china.subtitle: A Panorama of Millennial Civilization
china.intro: City-deep itineraries and themed routes for Chinese diaspora and inbound European travelers, with full local concierge.

cities.name: Beijing
cities.desc: Imperial capital — Forbidden City, Great Wall, hutongs

cities.name: Shanghai
cities.desc: The Bund, contemporary art, Michelin dining

cities.name: Xi'an
cities.desc: Silk Road origin — Terracotta Army, city walls

cities.name: Chengdu
cities.desc: Land of Plenty — pandas, Sichuan cuisine, slow life

cities.name: Hangzhou
cities.desc: West Lake, Longjing tea, Song-dynasty heritage

cities.name: Lijiang
cities.desc: Ancient town, Jade Dragon Snow Mountain

cities.name: Xiamen
cities.desc: Garden city by the sea, Gulangyu, Min culture

china.itinerariesIntro: Classic routes, fully customizable in days and city pairing.

itinerariesItems.name: Classic North · 8 days
itinerariesItems.desc: History + culture + modernity — the canonical first-time China trip

itinerariesItems.route: Xi'an → Lanzhou → Jiayuguan → Dunhuang → Urumqi → Kashgar
itinerariesItems.desc: The ancient Silk Road, ultimate cultural depth

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Email <link>support@finuo.fi</link> or call us — we respond promptly.
faq.a2: Absolutely — customization is our core. Tell us budget, dates, interests, we'll design.
faq.q3: What sets you apart from other agencies?
faq.a3: We're a Finland-based team, trilingual (Chinese/English/Finnish), with 10+ years of Nordic depth.
faq.a4: Quotes are tailored to group size and service depth — get in touch for details.

educationServices.title: Education Services
educationServices.description: Finuo Education Consulting is your trusted partner in studying abroad.

items.title: Promoting Local Finnish Educational Resources
items.description: Detailed information about Finnish universities, vocational schools, and high schools.

items.title: School and Program Selection Assistance
items.description: Personalized guidance based on academic interests, career goals, and personal preferences.

items.title: Application Guidance and Support
items.description: Comprehensive support for application materials including resumes, essays, and recommendation letters.

items.title: Visa and Immigration Assistance
items.description: Document preparation, appointments, and guidance through requirements.

items.title: Accommodation and Adaptation Support
items.description: Housing guidance plus cultural orientation and language training.

items.title: Scholarship and Financial Aid Support
items.description: Guidance on available scholarships and financial aid opportunities.

education.schoolsIntro: Universities, polytechnics, and high schools. Detailed institution profiles, admission requirements, and partnership programs.
education.trainingIntro: Programs designed for Chinese schools visiting Finland: STEAM teacher training, student short courses, and government/school custom solutions.

trainingItems.title: Teacher Training
trainingItems.desc: Finnish education law, phenomenon-based learning, classroom management — 1-2 week intensives

trainingItems.title: Student Training
trainingItems.desc: Summer/winter youth programs with classroom experience, cultural visits, outdoor activities

trainingItems.title: Custom Training
trainingItems.desc: Tailored programs by school or institution focus (arts, design, sustainability, etc.)

education.studyToursSubtitle: Study Tours — Nordic · China · Sino-European Exchange
education.studyToursIntro: Academic-cultural deep dives, distinct from regular tourism: every route has learning objectives and tangible outcomes.

studyToursItems.desc: Finnish education system + Nordic design + sustainable innovation company visits

studyToursItems.title: China Study Tours

studyToursItems.title: Sino-European Exchange
studyToursItems.desc: Bidirectional study tours with paired student visits and joint research projects

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About Finuo — Your Sino-European Bridge in Finland
about.intro: Finuo is a Finland-based service company linking China and Europe across travel, education, and MICE. With 10+ years of Nordic depth and a trilingual team (Chinese/English/Finnish), we aim to be your most reliable Nordic partner.
about.teamDesc: Local Chinese expats and Nordic specialists, fluent in cultural nuance and commercial logic.
about.partnersDesc: Long-term partnerships with Finnish universities, local governments, industry associations, and top resorts.
